title: T-026 — UI: export_report_modal + save_preset_modal + share_report_modal (RPT-011 + RPT-018) (12-REPORTING §15.1a, §8.4)
prompt:
# T-026 — Export + Save Preset + Share Report modals

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §8.4 Export flow, §15.1a RPT-011 Share Report Link Modal, §15.1a RPT-018 Save Filter Preset Modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- export_report_modal: modals.jsx:20-112
- save_preset_modal: modals.jsx:115-148
- share_report_modal: modals.jsx:258-282

## Goal
Three dashboard-action modals wired to existing Server Actions: export_report → T-013 exportDashboard, save_preset → T-008 save-preset, share_report → ephemeral signed URL (P1) with persistence deferred to P2 (PRD §15.1a RPT-011 note).

## Prototype parity
- export_report_modal: format radio (PDF/CSV; XLSX disabled badge), delivery select (download vs email), row-estimate threshold warnings/blocks (V-RPT-EXPORT-1/4), email field conditional on delivery='email', error/loading state machine.
- save_preset_modal: name + visibility radio + filter snapshot chips; create vs edit mode.
- share_report_modal: signed URL input + Copy + expiry select + 'Require Login' toggle + regulatory-dashboard force-auth note.

## Implementation contract
1. Three modals in `apps/web/components/reporting/modals/{export-report,save-preset,share-report}-modal.tsx` ('use client') using shadcn Dialog from packages/ui.
2. export-report-modal: form validates filters + format via zod; on submit calls T-013 exportDashboard Server Action; polls T-013 get-export-status; on success closes modal + Sonner toast with download link.
3. save-preset-modal: defaultValues from URL searchParams (filter snapshot); on submit calls T-008 save-preset Server Action; duplicate triggers inline overwrite branch (per RPT-018 spec).
4. share-report-modal: P1 generates ephemeral signed URL via Server Action (no DB row); regulatory dashboards (rpt_qc_holds, rpt_inventory_aging) force `requires_auth=true` and disable the toggle.
5. All labels via next-intl `reporting.modals.*`.
6. RTL test per modal + Playwright parity.

## Files
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/export-report-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/save-preset-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/share-report-modal.tsx [create]
- packages/reporting/src/actions/generate-share-link.ts [create]
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/__tests__/*.test.tsx [create per modal]
- apps/web/messages/{en,pl}/reporting-modals.json [modify — extend T-024 file]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given export modal opens for a dashboard with 5k rowEstimate, when user selects PDF + Download, then Server Action T-013 is invoked, modal shows pending state, and on success toast renders with download link.
2. Given export modal opens for a dashboard with 12k rowEstimate, when user attempts to submit, then submit is blocked with inline alert per V-RPT-EXPORT-1.
3. Given save_preset modal in create mode with name 'Weekly P1', when user submits, then Server Action saves; with a duplicate name, inline overwrite branch is offered (not an error toast).
4. Given save_preset visibility='my_team' but user is not Manager+, when submit is attempted, then Server Action returns forbidden error + audit row written (T-008).
5. Given share_report modal opens on /reporting/qc-holds (regulatory), when 'Require Login' toggle is inspected, then it is disabled with explanation note (forced true).
6. Given share_report Copy is clicked, when fired, then navigator.clipboard.writeText resolves and Sonner toast 'Link copied'.
7. UI parity per modal + next-intl wrapping + 4 states.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL per modal asserting parity + Server Action invocation + V-RPT-EXPORT-1 block + duplicate-overwrite branch + regulatory force-auth.
- Playwright parity per modal triggered from a dashboard page.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test export-report-modal save-preset-modal share-report-modal && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-action-modals`.
- GREEN: build 3 modals + share-link Server Action.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass T-013 export Server Action — exports always enqueue worker.
- Do not skip row-estimate cap V-RPT-EXPORT-1.
- Do not allow save_preset visibility='my_team' for non-Manager — server-side RBAC gate.
- Do not let share_report toggle override regulatory force-auth — domain rule.
- Do not bypass packages/ui shadcn Dialog.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping.
- Do not skip Playwright parity per modal.
- Do not persist share link rows in P1 — ephemeral signed URL only (PRD §15.1a RPT-011 P1 behaviour).

pipeline_inputs.description: Three action modals: export_report + save_preset + share_report. Wired to T-013 export + T-008 preset Server Actions; share P1 is ephemeral signed URL only.
pipeline_inputs.details: Reuse packages/ui shadcn Dialog. Regulatory dashboards force share auth=true. Duplicate preset triggers inline overwrite branch per RPT-018.
out_of_scope: Do not persist shared_report_links rows in P1 (P2)
acceptance_criteria: Given the production implementation is reviewed for parity, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/modals.jsx:20-112; prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/modals.jsx:115-148; prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/modals.jsx:258-282, then visual structure, shadcn primitives, interaction states, and Tailwind tokens match; Playwright trace + screenshot artifacts attached per _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md (export_report_modal + save_preset_modal + share_report_modal).
Given export modal opens for a dashboard with 5k rowEstimate, when user selects PDF + Download, then T-013 is invoked, modal shows pending state, success toast renders with download link
Given export modal opens for a dashboard with 12k rowEstimate, when user attempts to submit, then submit blocked with inline alert per V-RPT-EXPORT-1

Given the page/modal is exercised end-to-end, when closeout criteria are verified, then empty/loading/error/permission states are rendered per UI parity policy with Playwright trace + screenshot artifacts attached; all visible strings route through next-intl keys (no hardcoded labels).
test_strategy: RED: RTL per modal asserting parity + Server Action invocation + V-RPT-EXPORT-1 block + duplicate-overwrite branch + regulatory force-auth
Playwright parity per modal triggered from a dashboard page
Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test export-report-modal save-preset-modal share-report-modal && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-action-modals`
Attach Playwright traces + screenshots per modal in closeout

Do not skip row-estimate cap V-RPT-EXPORT-1
Do not allow save_preset visibility='my_team' for non-Manager — server-side RBAC gate

No raw PII in reports/exports — PII columns (email, phone, address, surname, dob, national_id) must be redacted, hashed, or omitted at the read-model boundary. Consult Foundation T-117 pino redact allowlist for the canonical PII column set.
